name.description:
The unique event name.
Note: To subscribe to all events, including events as they are added, specify an `*` as the value to represent a wildcard.

description.description: A human-readable description of the event.

status.description: The status of a webhook event.

resource_versions.description: Identifier for the event type example: 1.0/2.0 etc.

items.description: The ID for an event type. For example, `1.0` or `2.0`.
